title: Add sample_y() to GaussianProcessRegressor for posterior sampling
description:
sklearn GaussianProcessRegressor.sample_y(X, n_samples, random_state) draws samples from the posterior at each query point. Each draw is sampled from N(mean, K_post) where mean and K_post come from the GP posterior. Used for visualization and Bayesian decision-making.

Implementation: compute predictive mean + posterior covariance (already partially done in predict_with_std for variances), then Cholesky-decompose the covariance and draw n_samples standard-normal vectors. Returns shape (n_samples_query, n_samples).
